DylanJames.Stamina.Config.EnergyPerSecon: How much energy is restored each interval while sitting.
DylanJames.Stamina.Config.TickRateSecond: How many seconds pass between each energy restoration while sitting.
DylanJames.Stamina.Config.MaxEnergyRecov: The maximum percentage of total energy that can be restored by sitting.
DylanJames.Stamina.Config.Note.Text: These settings are for nerds and advanced users. Only modify them if you want to manually balance the mod for yourself. To undo changes, click 'Default' at the bottom of the screen.
